query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "qwen-agentworld: language world models for general agents" linguistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (d) and (f) as it provides a foundational cognitive architecture framework (CoALA) for organizing and analyzing language agents, which is the canonical methodological reference expected in a literature review for any research extending or evaluating LLM-based agent systems like "Qwen-AgentWorld."
